This card can only be attached to Fighting Pokémon. This card provides Fighting Energy only while this card is attached to a Fighting Pokémon.

The attacks of the Fighting Pokémon this card is attached to do 20 more damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

(If this card is attached to anything other than a Fighting Pokémon, discard this card.)

rules:

flavorText: Cinccino's body is coated in a special oil that helps it deflect attacks, such as punches.

attacks.effect: Your opponent reveals his or her hand. Choose a card you find there and put it on the bottom of your opponent's deck.

attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

flavorText: Cinccino's body is coated in a special oil that helps it deflect attacks, such as punches.
These Pokémon prefer a tidy habitat. They are always sweeping and dusting, using their tails as brooms.

flavorText: These Pokémon prefer a tidy habitat. They are always sweeping and dusting, using their tails as brooms.

attacks.name: Magical Symphony

attacks.effect: At the end of your opponent's next turn, discard the Defending Pokémon and all cards attached to it.

flavorText: Its roar in battle shakes the ground like a tremor–or like an earthquake has struck.

attacks.name: Stomp
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 40 more damage.

flavorText: The shock waves from its cries can tip over trucks. It stamps its feet to power up.

attacks.name: Round
attacks.effect: This attack does 10 damage times the number of your Pokémon that have the Round attack.

flavorText: If it senses danger, it scares the foe by crying out with the volume of a jet-plane engine.

attacks.name: Flash of Destruction
attacks.effect: Discard 2 Energy attached to this Pokémon.

rules: BREAK Evolution Rule: Lugia BREAK retains the attacks, Abilities, Weakness, Resistance, and Retreat Cost of its previous Evolution.

attacks.name: Intensifying Burn
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is a Pokémon-EX, this attack does 60 more damage.

flavorText: It is said to be the guardian of the seas. It is rumored to have been seen on the night of a storm.

attacks.name: Toss and Turn
attacks.effect: This attack can be used even if this Pokémon is Asleep. If it is, this attack does 90 more damage.

attacks.name: Swallow
attacks.effect: Heal from this Pokémon the same amount of damage you did to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavorText: Its stomach can digest any kind of food, even if it happens to be moldy or rotten.

attacks.name: Jet Draft
attacks.effect: Discard a Special Energy attached to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

rules: Put this card onto your Bench only with the effect of Old Amber Aerodactyl
flavorText: This vicious Pokémon is said to have flown in ancient skies while shrieking high-pitched cries.
If it is safe, the young gets out of the belly pouch to play. The adult keeps a close eye on the youngster.

attacks.name: Turmoil Strike
attacks.effect: This attack does 50 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon that has any damage counters on it. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavorText: Adores round objects. It wanders the streets on a nightly basis to look for dropped loose change.

attacks.name: Big Storm
attacks.effect: Discard any Stadium card in play.

attacks.effect: This attack does 30 more damage for each basic Lightning Energy attached to this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Light Steps
attacks.effect: Move an Energy from this Pokémon to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

flavorText: Like the wind, it can slip through any gap, no matter how small. It leaves balls of white fluff behind.
Perhaps because they feel more at ease in a group, they stick to others they find. They end up looking like a cloud.

attacks.name: Mist Purge
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon has any Special Energy attached to it, this attack does 30 more damage and heal 30 damage from each of your Pokémon.

rules:
Mega Evolution rule: When 1 of your Pokémon becomes a Mega Evolution Pokémon, your turn ends.

Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Ruckus
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

flavorText: Small Pokémon flee from its scary face. It is, however, considered by women to be cute.

attacks.name: Mimic
attacks.effect: Shuffle your hand into your deck. Then, draw a number of cards equal to the number of cards in your opponent's hand.

attacks.name: Juggling
attacks.effect: Flip 4 coins. This attack does 20 damage times the number of heads.

flavorText: It is adept at conning people. It is said to be able to create walls out of thin air by miming.

attacks.name: Expand
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, any damage done to this Pokémon by attacks is reduced by 30 (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

attacks.name: Double Slap
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 60 damage times the number of heads.

flavorText: The body is soft and rubbery. When angered, it will suck in air and inflate itself to an enormous size.
If it inflates to sing a lullaby, it can perform longer and cause sure drowsiness in its audience.

attacks.name: Rapid Blaster
attacks.effect: Discard as many Metal Energy attached to this Pokémon as you like. This attack does 20 more damage for each Energy card discarded in this way.

attacks.effect: This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness or Resistance.

attacks.name: Fight Alone
attacks.effect: If you have fewer Pokémon in play than your opponent, this attack does 60 more damage for each Pokémon fewer you have in play.

flavorText: By reading the auras of all things, it can tell how others are feeling from over half a mile away.

attacks.name: Metal Rain
attacks.effect: Discard as many Metal Energy attached to this Pokémon as you like. For each Energy card discarded in this way, choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon and do 30 damage to it. Don't apply Weakness and Resistance. (You may choose the same Pokémon more than once.)

rules: BREAK Evolution Rule: Bronzong BREAK retains the attacks, Abilities, Weakness, Resistance, and Retreat Cost of its previous Evolution.

attacks.name: Guard Press
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, any damage done to this Pokémon by attacks is reduced by 20 (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

flavorText: Ancient people believed that petitioning Bronzong for rain was the way to make crops grow.

attacks.name: Iron Defense
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, prevent all effects of attacks, including damage, done to this Pokémon during your opponent's next turn.

flavorText: Implements shaped like it were discovered in ancient tombs. It is unknown if they are related.

attacks.effect: This attack does 20 damage times the number of damage counters on this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Iron Head
attacks.effect: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 20 more damage for each heads.

flavorText: When Burmy evolved, its cloak became a part of this Pokémon's body. The cloak is never shed.

attacks.name: Bone Drop
attacks.effect: This attack does 60 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon that has an Ability. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavorText: Watching from the sky, they swoop to strike weakened Pokémon on the ground. They decorate themselves with bones.

attacks.name: Leer
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavorText: Their wings are too tiny to allow them to fly. They guard their posteriors with bones that were gathered by Mandibuzz.

attacks.name: Dark Mountain
attacks.effect: Discard the top 2 cards of your deck. This attack does 50 more damage for each Supporter card discarded in this way.

flavorText: If it rampages, it knocks down mountains and buries rivers. Maps must be redrawn afterward.

flavorText: It has slept underground for hundreds of millions of years since its birth. It's occasionally found during the excavation of caves.

attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavorText: With its wings, it controls its position in the air. It likes to attack from above, a maneuver that is difficult to defend against.
By reading the auras of all things, it can tell how others are feeling from over half a mile away.

attacks.name: Smash Punch
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

flavorText: The aura that emanates from its body intensifies to alert others if it is afraid or sad.

attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, any damage done to this Pokémon by attacks is reduced by 20 (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

attacks.name: Thrash
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage. If tails, this Pokémon does 20 damage to itself.

flavorText: Its shell is as hard as sheet rock, and it is also very strong. Its thrashing can topple a mountain.

attacks.name: Mountain Munch
attacks.effect: Discard the top card of your opponent's deck.

flavorText: Born deep underground, it comes aboveground and becomes a pupa once it has finished eating the surrounding soil.

attacks.name: Reckless Charge
attacks.effect: This Pokémon does 10 damage to itself.

flavorText: Born deep underground, it comes aboveground and becomes a pupa once it has finished eating the surrounding soil.

attacks.name: Cling
attacks.effect: Heal from this Pokémon the same amount of damage you did to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: X-Scissor
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 60 more damage.

flavorText: A slim and fast swimmer. It slices its prey with its sharp sickles and drinks the body fluids.

rules: Put this card onto your Bench only with the effect of Dome Fossil Kabuto
flavorText: This Pokémon was regenerated from the fossil of an ancient creature. It protects itself with a hard shell.

attacks.name: Bonemerang
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 60 damage times the number of heads.

flavorText: The bone it holds is its key weapon. It throws the bone skillfully like a boomerang to KO targets.
Its skin is very thin. If it is exposed to light, its blood heats up, causing it to grow weak.

attacks.name: Link Fusion
attacks.effect: If Solosis is on your Bench, this attack does 30 more damage. If Duosion is on your Bench, this attack does 60 more damage. If Reuniclus is on your Bench, this attack does 90 more damage.

flavorText: When Reuniclus shake hands, a network forms between their brains, increasing their psychic power.

attacks.name: Double Link
attacks.effect: If Solosis is on your Bench, this attack does 30 more damage. If Duosion is on your Bench, this attack does 60 more damage.

flavorText: When their two divided brains think the same thoughts, their psychic power is maximized.

attacks.name: Mini Link
attacks.effect: If Solosis is on your Bench, this attack does 30 more damage.

flavorText: They drive away attackers by unleashing psychic power. They can use telepathy to talk with others.

attacks.name: Psybeam
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.

flavorText: They intently observe both Trainers and Pokémon. Apparently, they are looking at something only Gothita can see.

attacks.name: Head Walking
attacks.effect: Put a Basic Pokémon from your opponent's discard pile onto his or her Bench. Then, put 3 damage counters on that Pokémon.

attacks.name: Knock Back
attacks.effect: Your opponent switches his or her Active Pokémon with 1 of his or her Benched Pokémon.

flavorText: It uses black pearls to amplify its psychic power. It does an odd dance to gain control over foes.

attacks.name: Rocket Jump
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

flavorText: It bounces around on its tail to keep its heart pumping. It carries a pearl from Clamperl on its head.

attacks.name: Encounter
attacks.effect: Search your deck for a Pokémon, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

flavorText: Its DNA is said to contain the genetic codes of all Pokémon, so it can use all kinds of techniques.

attacks.name: Balloon Bomb
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. For each heads, discard 2 cards from the top of your opponent's deck.

attacks.name: Thick Liquid
attacks.effect: Both Active Pokémon are now Confused and Poisoned.

flavorText: Very rarely, a sudden mutation can result in two small Koffing twins becoming conjoined as a Weezing.

attacks.name: Division
attacks.effect: Search your deck for up to 2 Koffing and put them onto your Bench. Shuffle your deck afterward.

flavorText: Lighter-than-air gases in its body keep it aloft. The gases not only smell, they are also explosive.

attacks.name: Zen Force
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 more damage for each damage counter on your opponent's Active Pokémon.

Mega Evolution rule: When 1 of your Pokémon becomes a Mega Evolution Pokémon, your turn ends.

Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.effect: Put 3 damage counters on each of your opponent's Pokémon that has any Energy attached to it.

attacks.effect: Search your deck for a basic Energy card and attach it to this Pokémon. Shuffle your deck afterward.

attacks.name: Plasmagic
attacks.effect: Move 2 damage counters from each of your Pokémon to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavorText: Its body is composed of plasma. It is known to infiltrate electronic devices and wreak havoc.
Barbaracle's legs and hands have minds of their own, and they will move independently. But they usually follow the head's orders.

attacks.name: Swing Around
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 20 more damage for each heads.

flavorText: They stretch and then contract, yanking their rocks along with them in bold hops. They eat seaweed that washes up on the shoreline.

attacks.name: Burning Icicles
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon has any Fire Energy attached to it, this attack does 20 damage to 2 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Blizzard Burn
attacks.effect: This Pokémon can't attack during your next turn.

flavorText: It generates a powerful, freezing energy inside itself, but its body became frozen when the energy leaked out.

attacks.name: Second Bite
attacks.effect: This attack does 10 more damage for each damage counter on your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Crystal Ray
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks from Evolution Pokémon.

rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.
BREAK Evolution Rule: Omastar BREAK retains the attacks, Abilities, Weakness, Resistance, and Retreat Cost of its previous Evolution.

flavorText: Once wrapped around its prey, it never lets go. It eats the prey by tearing at it with sharp fangs.

rules: Put this card onto your Bench only with the effect of Helix Fossil Omanyte
flavorText: Revived from an ancient fossil, this Pokémon uses air stored in its shell to sink and rise in water.

attacks.name: Freezing Breath
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed. If tails, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.

flavorText: Its streamlined body has little drag in water. The colder the temperature, the friskier it gets.
Covered with light blue fur, its hide is thick and tough. It is active in bitter cold of -40 degrees Fahrenheit.

rules: BREAK Evolution Rule: Delphox BREAK retains the attacks, Abilities, Weakness, Resistance, and Retreat Cost of its previous Evolution.

attacks.name: Flickering Flames
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Psystorm
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 damage times the amount of Energy attached to all Pokémon in play.

flavorText: Using psychic power, it generates a fiery vortex of 5,400 degree Fahrenheit, incinerating foes swept into this whirl of flame.

attacks.name: Destructive Flame
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, discard an Energy attached to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavorText: When the twig is plucked from its tail, friction sets the twig alight. The flame is used to send signals to its allies.

attacks.name: Invite Out
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, switch 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon with his or her Active Pokémon.

flavorText: As it walks, it munches on a twig in place of a snack. It intimidates opponents by puffing hot air out of its ears.

attacks.name: Tail Whip
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon can't attack during your opponent's next turn.

flavorText: As it walks, it munches on a twig in place of a snack. It intimidates opponents by puffing hot air out of its ears.

attacks.name: Flying Flare
attacks.effect: You may do 40 more damage. If you do, this Pokémon does 20 damage to itself.

flavorText: One of the legendary bird Pokémon. It is said that its appearance indicates the coming of spring.

attacks.name: Find a Friend
attacks.effect: Search your deck for a Pokémon, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

flavorText: The turning of the seasons changes the color and scent of this Pokémon's fur. People use it to mark the seasons.

attacks.name: Coil
attacks.effect: During your next turn, this Pokémon's attacks do 60 more damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

attacks.name: Slashing Strike
attacks.effect: This Pokémon can't use Slashing Strike during your next turn.

flavorText: It can stop its opponents' movements with just a glare. It takes in solar energy and boosts it internally.
When it gets dirty, its leaves can't be used in photosynthesis, so it always keeps itself clean.

attacks.name: Blot
attacks.effect: Heal 10 damage from this Pokémon.

flavorText: They photosynthesize by bathing their tails in sunlight. When they are not feeling well, their tails droop.
It flutters around at night and steals honey from the Combee hive.

attacks.name: Solar Ray
attacks.effect: Heal 20 damage from each of your Pokémon.

attacks.name: Leaf Cutter
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage.

flavorText: When Burmy evolved, its cloak became a part of this Pokémon's body. The cloak is never shed.
If its cloak is broken in battle, it quickly remakes the cloak with materials nearby.

attacks.name: Hide a Berry
attacks.effect: Draw 2 cards. Then, put a card from your hand on the bottom of your deck.

attacks.name: Wrap
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavorText: It stores Berries inside its shell. To avoid attacks, it hides beneath rocks and remains completely still.
